title: M&A is ‘on fire’ as large-cap firms simplify, Citi UK CEO says
summary_full: Citi U.K. CEO Tiina Lee said U.K. M&A is “on fire” as companies simplify and overseas buyers target British assets.
summary_public: Citi U.K. CEO Tiina Lee said U.K. M&A is “on fire” as companies simplify and overseas buyers target British assets.
